name: =?utf-8?Q?Kaj=20Larsen?=
subject: Eric Greitens
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,

I first met Eric in Navy SEAL training. Over the course of that training and our first military deployments together, I witnessed a man who was an incredible leader. He led our unit the way few could--with humility and a servant's heart.

Eric's story is inspiring. He set out to make a difference and he has succeeded. The Mission Continues has helped thousands of veterans find purpose. He's been named one of the world's most influential leaders by Fortune and Time Magazine. And maybe most importantly, he's raising two young boys with the values of compassion and courage.

I hope you'll take [60 seconds to watch my friend's story](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=e49693638f&e=84041254e6). I think it will help you understand the important mission he's on today.
[](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=90453d0b94&e=84041254e6)
Please [watch this video and share it with your friends](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=004a1099b7&e=84041254e6). Missouri needs leadership. It won't come from another career politician. I know that Eric will do what it takes to turn Missouri in a new direction and how hard he will work to earn your vote on November 8th--and your trust every day that he serves.
Best,

Kaj Larsen
Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
4579 Laclede Avenue #138
St. Louis, Missouri 63108
Eric is a former member of the United States Navy having served four deployments overseas. Use of his military rank, titles and photographs in uniform does not imply an endorsement from the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

You can always reach us at [team@ericgreitens.com](mailto:team@ericgreitens.com) or (314) 899-0288. You're still reading the fineprint? Our effort to defeat Hillary Clinton and turn this country around is more than just a campaign, it is a movement.

In all 50 states, proud Americans are standing up and joining our movement by the millions. Many of them have never been involved in politics before. Until now, they've never had anyone speaking up for them, against the DC elites who have sold us out and rigged the economy against working families.

So while Hillary Clinton calls us "deplorables," **I am 100% PROUD of the people standing with us**...patriotic people who see radical Islamic terrorism, out-of-control crime, jobs shipped overseas, Washington corruption and career politicians doing NOTHING about these problems.

name: Matt Rosendale
subject: Absentee Ballots Mailed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt for Montana, PO Box 1538, Helena, MT 59624, Republican, Lorna Kuney, Treasurer |
body:
Matt Rosendale for Montana
| |
---|---|---
|
[](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38079907:WFYwnqbTN:m:1:1443712213:D09648B095D3952BC8474640BDFB7572:r) Friend,

I wanted to reach out to let you know that absentee ballots have been mailed and**I would greatly appreciate your support in the race for State Auditor.** [If you aren't sure what role the State Auditor plays in Montana, click here to read my recent guest editorial explaining why I want to serve](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38079908:WFYwnqbTN:m:1:1443712213:D09648B095D3952BC8474640BDFB7572:r).

_My opponent has the backing of the insurance special interests in our state. These are the same folks who --like my opponent--lobbied the legislature to bring Obamacare to Montana._ _They succeeded and now you and I are paying the price_. Our insurance premiums are through the roof, deductibles are up and access to healthcare is down for many. __**All while my opponent's donors rake in huge bonuses and bankroll his campaign --nearly $40,000! **__

[You would think given the massive premium hikes we have seen, my opponent would be reluctant to throw the good people of Montana under the bus, however, as he's said on the record, he won't be picky where his money comes from](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38079909:WFYwnqbTN:m:1:1443712213:D09648B095D3952BC8474640BDFB7572:r). Now he wants to go further and implement a single-payer system. That means a complete government takeover of our healthcare system. [Can't believe it? Watch for yourself!](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38079910:WFYwnqbTN:m:1:1443712213:D09648B095D3952BC8474640BDFB7572:r)

However, there is good news on the horizon. Even with the special interests in his corner, we are winning. He has raised nearly three times the money, and yet we are winning. We are winning because Montanans like us understand that government run healthcare is not the way to go.

As we enter the final stretch, your support is critical. [If every person who receives this email would donate just $7, we would match my opponent's fundraising to date. That means if you chip in $7 today, we can share our vision with the rest of Montana](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38079909:WFYwnqbTN:m:1:1443712213:D09648B095D3952BC8474640BDFB7572:r).

Our vision is less government involvement, greater access to healthcare and more competition in the marketplace. More competition drives costs down and anyone who has ever owned or run a business knows that the less it costs to do business, the more you can grow your company and create good jobs for Montana.

[That's what it's all about. Your $7 can help us spread our message](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38079911:WFYwnqbTN:m:1:1443712213:D09648B095D3952BC8474640BDFB7572:r).

The truth is we have some good folks in our corner. _I was recently endorsed by the Montana Stockgrowers' PAC (Montana Agricultural PAC), Montana Farm Bureau Federation and the Montana Association of REALTORS._ I am also very proud to announce that **_I am a 3-time Montana Chamber of Commerce "Champion of Business!"_**

**As this election cycle comes to a close, I would love to earn your support as well.**

I look forward to serving as your next State Auditor. _Please remember to return your absentee ballot as soon as possible_.

Warm Regards,
[](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38079907:WFYwnqbTN:m:1:1443712213:D09648B095D3952BC8474640BDFB7572:r)
Matt Rosendale

[PS--You can click here to make your $7 donation securely online right now](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38079911:WFYwnqbTN:m:1:1443712213:D09648B095D3952BC8474640BDFB7572:r).

As we enter the final stretch, your support is critical. . Our vision is less government involvement, greater access to healthcare and more competition in the marketplace. More competition drives costs down and anyone who has ever owned or run a business knows that the less it costs to do business, the more you can grow your company and create good jobs for Montana. . The truth is we have some good folks in our corner. I was recently endorsed by the Montana Stockgrowers' PAC (Montana Agricultural PAC), Montana Farm Bureau Federation and the Montana Association of REALTORS. I am also very proud to announce that I am a 3-time Montana Chamber of Commerce "Champion of Business!" As this election cycle comes to a close, I would love to earn your support as well. I look forward to serving as your next State Auditor. Please remember to return your absentee ballot as soon as possible. name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: #ReleaseTheTapes
body:
**[Tell MGM: Release the Trump tapes](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/s5y4Q/6/6L/r5cs/6FKsuH/6kCiySMUjc)**
_Petition to MGM:_
**" Release any and all recordings of Donald Trump's off-air remarks during the filming of 'The Apprentice'. The American people deserve to be informed about their choices in this election."**
Add your name:
[ ](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/s5y4Q/s/6L/r5cs/6FKsuH/sgILv3F3B6)
---
Dear Friend,
[ ](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/s5y4Q/v/6L/r5cs/6FKsuH/TXs1n8IfS)
---
**[There may be even more tapes on Donald Trump.](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/s5y4Q/z/6L/r5cs/6FKsuH/UsOUISgkTd)**
On Friday evening, The Washington Post published an account of a video recording of Trump in which the openly racist and fascist Republican candidate talks about women in ways that are beyond offensive.1 The Associated Press had previously reported that Trump "repeatedly demeaned women with sexist language, according to show insiders who said he rated female contestants by the size of their breasts and talked about which ones he'd like to have sex with."2
According to earlier reports, Mark Burnett, the creator and executive producer of "The Apprentice," was reportedly threatening to sue his own employees in order to hide more evidence of Donald Trump's outrageous behavior on the show - **which may even include video of Trump using a racial epithet. 3**
After facing a massive public outcry, yesterday afternoon Burnett denied those reports as "unequivocally false" and claimed "MGM owns Mark Burnett's production company and the Apprentice is one of its properties." Burnett added "various contractual and legal requirements also restrict MGM's ability to release" the tapes.4
Either way, this may be all on tape, which MGM is keeping from the American people. **The American people deserve as much information as possible about this misogynistic, unqualified demagogue who could end up with the country 's nuclear codes.**
**[Tell MGM: Release the Trump tapes. Click here to sign the petition.](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/s5y4Q/U/6L/r5cs/6FKsuH/pZeKqw2IP)**
The New York Daily News reported in detail what may be on the tapes, and If any of that is true, the American people deserve to know.5 To date, Trump has lied about and obfuscated his racism, xenophobia and misogyny - and gotten away with it. He still tried to claim in last night's debate that he respects women.
With the release of Friday's bombshell report that further exposed Trump as a serial misogynist, we need to do everything we can to release other Trump tapes to further expose his vile and deplorable racism.
**[Tell MGM: Release the Trump tapes. Click here to sign the petition.](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/s5y4Q/j/6L/r5cs/6FKsuH/m5CaLX3Lv)**
It's now clear that supporting a Trump presidency means not only standing with a dangerous demagogue who is undermining our democracy, but aiding and abetting a full-scale assault on human decency.
The election is less than 30 days away. **Waiting until after the election would only risk even greater chaos. The time to ramp up the pressure is now.**
**Tell MGM: Release the Trump tapes. Click the link below to sign the petition.**
**[http://act.credoaction.com/sign/apprentice_tapes_dems/](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/s5y4Q/5/6L/r5cs/6FKsuH/6lFnRcP2yI)**
**Thank you** for speaking out,
Murshed Zaheed, Political Director
[CREDO Action from Working Assets](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/s5y4Q/r/R/r5cs/6FKsuH/U324QHwXq0)
Add your name:
[ ](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/s5y4Q/Y/6L/r5cs/6FKsuH/6MnVTA7tKg)
---
_References:_
1\. David A. Fahrenthold, "[Trump recorded having extremely lewd conversation about women in 2005](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/s5y4Q/e/6Z/r5cs/6FKsuH/v8sh2AYX3C)," The Washington Post, Oct. 7, 2016.
2\. Garance Burke, "['Apprentice' Crew Speaks Out Against Donald Trump](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/s5y4Q/3/6R/r5cs/6FKsuH/69c26aUPd3)," Associated Press, Oct. 3, 2016.
3\. Julia Reinstein, "[Source: Trump-Backer Mark Burnett Has Warned Staff On "Apprentice" Leaks](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/s5y4Q/W/61/r5cs/6FKsuH/6PJNvBJRqW)," Buzzfeed, Oct. 9, 2016.
4\. Brian Stelter, [Twitter](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/s5y4Q/x/6f/r5cs/6FKsuH/vsKpl7v6EZ), Oct. 10, 2016.
5\. Adam Edelman, "[Producers of 'The Apprentice' sitting on footage of Donald Trump using N-word: claim](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/s5y4Q/d/6h/r5cs/6FKsuH/sY3tPwy6Mz)," New York Daily News, Oct. 9, 2016.

If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please [Manage Your Subscription](http://democrats.ontraport.com/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvNzYvMC82ZDJiNTMxZjI0MjMwNWVmMGVhN2M0MTI4NmQzMzcxZS8zMTM0NzQxNw==)
Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

Hey Team --

I've spent most of my adult life organizing -- community issues, electoral politics, you name it. When it comes to close elections, I understand firsthand just how much every vote matters.

And that means every interaction we have with a voter is incredibly valuable. Each one could be the difference between a great win and a bitter loss. But friends, time is running out.

[**We still have hundreds of voters to reach in your area before November 8 -- please, can you spare a few hours before Election Day to help us get out the vote for Katie? >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4989210890671751168/9216078976227737600)

Our race to elect Governor Maggie Hassan, which will almost certainly decide Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court, is going to be a sprint to the finish. name: Rob Portman
subject: Early Voting Begins Tomorrow! ☑️
body:
| Peter,

Tomorrow marks what our campaign has been working towards for almost two years: Ohioans begin to cast their votes. Starting tomorrow, you will be able to vote early in person at your local early voting location. And if you have requested an absentee ballot, it will be arriving in the mail in the next few days.

It is important that you bank your vote early. **You can request an absentee ballot or find your voting location and hours by[clicking here](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myohiovote.com&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=early_vote&n=1).**

We're working very hard to earn your vote. In Ohio's Senate race, there's a clear choice between moving forward with our pro-growth policies for better wages and more jobs, or returning to Ted Strickland's failed policies of higher taxes, more regulations, and bigger government.

I've worked hard to deliver results for Ohio families, passing laws to combat human trafficking and fight back against Ohio's heroin epidemic. But Ted Strickland didn't pass a single bill into law during his 12 years in Congress, and as governor, he oversaw the loss of more than 350,000 jobs when Ohio ranked 48th in job creation.

Our incredible team of volunteers and interns has contacted more than 4.3 million voters through our unrivaled door-to-door and phone programs. But our hard work will not pay off until you cast your vote.

Our race could determine which party controls the Senate, and it will certainly decide the path our state and nation takes next.

**I'm asking for your vote.** Together, we can keep Ohio moving forward. Please [click here](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myohiovote.com&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=early_vote&n=2) to see how you can cast your vote early!

All best,
Rob Portman [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=early_vote&n=3)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=early_vote&n=4)[

](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=early_vote&n=5)
---

| | Hi there,

The Vermont governor's race is close right now, and Sue Minter needs our help.

Sue has outraised her opponent, Lt. Gov. Phil Scott, the last five reporting periods, but that advantage is getting chipped away -- the Republican Governors Association is dropping $600,000 into the race to support Scott. And he put up his first general election TV ad last week.

With the new wave of Republican cash, Sue could be in real trouble.

**[Help Sue fight back against the wall of Republican spending. 100% of your donation will go directly to her campaign.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c09f7/24c69fd9/11384f9d/18eb6ab6/417653203/VEsE/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate/candidate/sue-minter?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Help+Sue+fight+back+against+the+wall+of+&utm_campaign=WPEFCV26N_digital_email_20161011_Minter_n-all&source=WPEFCV26N_digital_email_20161011_Minter_n-all")**

Sue has a record of making big strides for Vermont -- as deputy secretary of transportation she helped Vermont rebuild after Tropical Storm Irene caused catastrophic flooding. And as a state representative she sponsored and passed over 200 bills and resolutions that became law.

Sue's got a great record to be the next governor of Vermont, but this race will be close. _Cook Political Report_ rates it as a toss-up. And while it's tempting to think of Vermont as a reliably blue state, four of their last eight governors have been Republicans.

**With less than 30 days before Election Day, there's no time to waste. Donate $3 to help Sue fight back now -- 100% of your donation will go directly to her campaign:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Help-Sue-Now](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c09f7/24c69fd9/11384f9d/18eb6ab7/417653203/VEsF/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate/candidate/sue-minter?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHelpSueNow&utm_campaign=WPEFCV26N_digital_email_20161011_Minter_n-all&source=WPEFCV26N_digital_email_20161011_Minter_n-all")**

Lucinda Guinn

Friend, we need you on the Trump Team.

And in order to show you how much your support means to me, I am sending you an _**exclusive, non-transferable, invitation-only**_ opportunity to receive a limited edition **Trump Black Card.**
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecebaSWwBAC0ScBQsOoaGVJaDRMN6aaaaGVJaBL4-W1ga?q=6@y548w4&a=hl0ephmo-3_kieep.Ysi&p=c&1=&n=5w5x52CpvqqlCXpWggCYenh6zzChygCyCfjYCpCpCdj6i&pCp)
Who will be carrying this card? Only those who want to make a strong statement in this election.

It's a statement that says you'll be standing WITH ME this final month of the campaign, AGAINST the onslaught of Crooked Hillary's negative ads, and AGAINST the failed Obama policies of the past.

You'll be on a team that will be sending a message to Crooked Hillary to watch out, that we're coming for her.

So Friend, I need you to make it your top priority right now to accept this exclusive invitation:

| **For Immediate Release**
October 11, 2016

**Media Contact** : Ethan Latour
[ethan@philscott.org](mailto:ethan@philscott.org)
802-595-3776
**PHIL SCOTT HIGHLIGHTS HIS PLANS TO FOCUS ON ECONOMY AND AFFORDABILITY IN PBS CANDIDATE COMMENTARY SERIES**
**Middlesex, Vt., October 11, 2016 –** Taking part in the Vermont PBS _Candidate Commentaries_ series, Phil Scott detailed his commitment to focusing on the economy and affordability, and his plans to strengthen Vermont’s economy as Governor.

Scott has made the economy and affordability cornerstones of his campaign, offering the most comprehensive economic growth plan in this election, with over 50 proposals and ideas to strengthen Vermont’s economy, make Vermont more affordable and address some of our most serious health and safety challenges. The full plan can be viewed at [_www.philscott.org._](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=5123fa7df9&e=19cebfe173)

“I’m running for governor to strengthen the economy, make Vermont more affordable and restore faith and trust in Government,” Scott states in the [commentary titled _#1 Priority_](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=4a521e6f22&e=19cebfe173). “To make Vermont more affordable, we need to get healthcare and property tax reform back on track, modernize state government, and make sure state spending never grows faster than our economy or your wages,” he adds.

[In a video on jobs and the economy](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=8f21a02770&e=19cebfe173), Scott tells Vermonters “I understand what it’s like to live paycheck to paycheck while growing a family business and raising a family right here in Vermont.” He explains that knowledge will guide his leadership and is why his economic growth plans “focus on rebuilding our economic foundation and strengthening our economic centers so young people have good job opportunities when they graduate, and working families and retirees can afford to stay here.”

Scott has put forward numerous plans and ideas to grow Vermont’s economy, and laid out how he’ll restore fiscal discipline in Montpelier and [Vermonters’ faith and trust in state government](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=af49cc7b83&e=19cebfe173). His [12-part Economic Growth Plan](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=ab9ebc0f3f&e=19cebfe173), and his plans for [government modernization](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=b4839c26db&e=19cebfe173), [truth in budgeting and fiscal responsibility](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=7411b7a692&e=19cebfe173), [healthcare reform](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=c6e500492d&e=19cebfe173), [transportation priorities](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=77136cca2f&e=19cebfe173) and [opiate action](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=3d9034267c&e=19cebfe173) can be found at [www.philscott.org](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=1ad82a3074&e=19cebfe173).

New Hampshire Democrats are dodging debates again!

clean_body: Friend, New Hampshire Democrats are dodging debates again! Three New Hampshire Democrats have ducked requests or declined to debate with Republican candidates: Carol Shea-Porter has declined all debate requests from Congressman Frank Guinta; Colin Van Ostern has cancelled two debates he previously agreed to have with Executive Councilor Chris Sununu; Maggie Hassan refuses to attend a debate with Senator Kelly Ayotte on national security, one of the most pressing concerns to Granite Staters. It's shameful that New Hampshire Democrats continue to disgrace the time-honored Granite State tradition of answering unscripted questions from local media and concerned voters. Republican candidates always offer to take the hard questions and give straightforward answers, which is why we need your help! ( ) ( ) Please chip in $10, $25, or even $50 TODAY ( ) so that the Party can bring the fight to these Democrat debate dodgers! Every dollar received is used to inform all voters that our Republican candidates can and will answer the hard questions. They are not afraid to debate their opponents. Thank you for your support and dedication to our Party! Mike Swetz Finance Director New Hampshire Republican State Committee Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.nh.gop ( ) footer image

Peter,

We have twenty-eight days left until the election, and Team Greitens is on the move!

Eric's mission to take Missouri in a new direction with more jobs, higher pay, safer streets, and better schools has gained national attention. Our Campaign was recently ranked as the [biggest pickup opportunity for Republicans nationwide](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=f0edcc0e70&e=84041254e6).

subject: Unbelievable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5053e/7be36b49/1e5780b3/78f806e2/1959883662/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Friend -- After Donald Trump's disgusting comments about women were made public on Friday, Evan called on Congressman Todd Young to rescind his support of Trump.

Congressman Young's response? After giving the matter "serious consideration," **he's _doubled down_ on his support of Trump.**

Unbelievable! If Congressman Young can't see that a man who brags about assaulting women should not be president of the United States, then he has no business representing Hoosiers in the U.S. Senate.

**[Will you pitch in $5 today to defeat Congressman Young and elect a senator that Hoosiers know and trust -- Evan Bayh?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5053e/7be36b49/1e5780b3/78f806e1/1959883662/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-email?refcode=20161011.2nd&amount=10")**

Donald Trump's comments were damaging and dangerous to women and to our society. And yet Congressman Young is still supporting him, in what the _Washington Post_ calls a "particularly delicate balancing act."

**Hoosiers have to show that his response is unacceptable. And we can do that by winning this election.** But with only 28 days left -- and with Indiana early voting starting _tomorrow_ \-- we don't have much time.

**[Please, pitch in $5 now to defeat Trump supporter Congressman Young and send Evan to the Senate.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5053e/7be36b49/1e5780b3/78f806e1/1959883662/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-email?refcode=20161011.2nd&amount=10")**
